name: document-ingest
description: Normalize documents and Zoom transcripts with source and derived-file provenance.

tools.name: document_ingest
tools.description: Prepare, review, validate, and finalize document-ingest runs with provenance.

tools.name: pdf_to_markdown
tools.description: Extract one PDF to Markdown and document-ingest provenance artifacts.

tools.name: docx_to_markdown
tools.description: Convert one DOCX to Markdown and document-ingest provenance artifacts.

tools.name: pptx_to_markdown
tools.description: Extract one PPTX to Markdown with slide text, tables, notes, alt text, warnings, and source maps.

tools.name: extract_metadata
tools.description: Read or prepare document-ingest metadata for PDF and DOCX sources.
